title: Magic Mirror
description: Adds the Magic Mirror Item from Terraria
body:
Step 1 - Right Click Your Bed to Link it to a Magic Mirror 


Step 2 - Right Click With  Magic Mirror To Return to Your Linked Bed Location

 

Crafting Recipe: 

[Diamond] [Glass] [Diamond]

[Glass] [Ender Pearl] [Glass]

[Diamond] [Glass] [Diamond]
